current_request.your_requested_email_is: You requested to change your email address to:
current_request.check_your_new_email: Please check your new email address to confirm the change. You may need to refresh this page afterward.
current_request.you_can_cancel: You can also cancel your email change request to keep your current email.

new_request.enter_new_email: Enter your new email along with your current password.
new_request.you_will_receive_an_email: You will receive an email at the new address to confirm the change.

create_password.part_1: If you sign in using Google, you might not have a password.
create_password.part_2: You can create a password by logging out, then going to the sign in page.
create_password.part_3: Use the "Forgot your password?" link, which will allow you to create a password.

messaging.confirmation_link_sent: A confirmation link has been sent to your new email address. Click the link to finish changing your email.
messaging.your_request_was_cancelled: Your email change request was cancelled.
messaging.unable_to_cancel_request: Unable to cancel request. It may already be fulfilled.
messaging.something_went_wrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.
